---
name: Improvement
about: Suggest a refinement to existing behavior, documentation, tooling, or engineering practice
title: "improvement: "
labels: improvement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the improvement in 1-3 sentences.

## Current State

What exists today?

What feels confusing, slow, inconsistent, fragile, hard to maintain, or incomplete?

## Proposed Improvement

What should change?

Explain the desired behavior, documentation update, refactor, tooling change, or UX refinement.

## Scope

Which areas are affected?

- [ ] Flutter mobile app
- [ ] Android native host
- [ ] iOS native host
- [ ] Wear OS app
- [ ] watchOS app
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] AI coach
- [ ] Database/migrations
- [ ] Packages/shared logic
- [ ] Design system
- [ ] CI/tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Risk

Describe any risk to architecture boundaries, routing, state ownership, data ownership, privacy, sync behavior, UI consistency, watch behavior, or release flow.

- [ ] Low risk / docs or cleanup only
- [ ] UI behavior risk
- [ ] Data/sync risk
- [ ] API/backend risk
- [ ] Privacy/security risk
- [ ] Build/release risk

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Validation Ideas

List checks that would prove the improvement is safe.

Examples:

- `melos analyze`
- `melos test`
- `flutter test`
- focused backend test
- manual mobile UI check
- manual watch workflow check
- docs-only review
